productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Brasilia 5 Me Blue Backpacks
description: If you want a bag that is funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this black Brasilia backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it can become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!MeasurementHeight: 45 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 20 cmCapacity: 28 litresMade of 80% polyester and 20% nylon for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityTwo main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful itemsOne roomy zippered compartment and one other zippered compartment with a detailed organizer for storing essentialsnike swoosh printed on the frontGraphic print on the sidesPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyNike Swoosh on strapHaul loop for handling easeBranding on strapsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
